creator: breno.leitao@gmail.com
text:
There is a new commit on HEAD that broke the loader on powerpc64 on KVM. I tested on both Power8 and Power9.

This break the loader once the kernel is loaded:

Loading /boot/defaults/loader.conf
/boot/kernel/kernel data=0x11ef978+0x4c6e48 syms=[0x8+0x1684e0panic: zfree(0x183c0c0,4224): corrupt memlist2
--> Press a key on the console to reboot <--


Since this crash is in the loader, it break the whole machine, and I am not able to load the old kernel.

This is the current kernel I built:
